title: Unity MCP All Tool Input Schemas

tools.name: unity_project_ping
tools.description: Verify control connectivity and editor heartbeat.

tools.name: unity_project_get_info
tools.description: Return project/runtime/editor basics.

tools.name: unity_project_get_build_settings
tools.description: Read active build target and Build Settings summary.

tools.name: unity_project_list_build_scenes
tools.description: List scenes currently configured in Build Settings.

tools.name: unity_project_get_player_settings
tools.description: Read common PlayerSettings values for the active build target.

tools.name: unity_project_get_project_settings
tools.description: Read common project-wide editor settings.

tools.name: unity_project_run_tests
tools.description: Run Unity Test Framework tests (defaults to EditMode).

tools.name: unity_project_switch_build_target
tools.description: Switch the active Unity build target synchronously.

tools.name: unity_project_build_player
tools.description: Build the player for the current active build target using enabled Build Settings scenes.

tools.name: unity_project_set_build_scenes
tools.description: Replace the Build Settings scene list.

tools.name: unity_editor_get_console_logs
tools.description: Read Unity Console messages with incremental polling.

tools.name: unity_editor_get_selection
tools.description: Read the current Unity Editor selection.

tools.name: unity_editor_set_selection
tools.description: Replace the current Editor selection with scene objects and assets.

tools.name: unity_editor_frame_selection
tools.description: Frame the current scene selection in the active SceneView.

tools.name: unity_editor_clear_console
tools.description: Clear Unity Console.

tools.name: unity_runtime_get_playmode_status
tools.description: Query play mode runtime state.

tools.name: unity_runtime_start_playmode
tools.description: Enter play mode and optionally wait until state transition completes.

tools.name: unity_runtime_stop_playmode
tools.description: Exit play mode and optionally wait until complete.

tools.name: unity_scene_list
tools.description: List scenes from Build Settings and/or project assets.

tools.name: unity_scene_list_loaded
tools.description: List currently loaded scenes in the editor.

tools.name: unity_scene_get_active
tools.description: Get the currently active loaded scene.

tools.name: unity_scene_open
tools.description: Open a scene in Editor.

tools.name: unity_scene_set_active
tools.description: Set the active scene among loaded scenes.

tools.name: unity_scene_close
tools.description: Close a loaded scene.

tools.name: unity_scene_create
tools.description: Create and save a new scene asset.

tools.name: unity_scene_save
tools.description: Save a loaded scene, optionally to a new output path.

tools.name: unity_scene_save_all
tools.description: Save all loaded scenes that have paths.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_find
tools.description: Find scene objects by conditions.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_get
tools.description: Get a GameObject snapshot including transform, hierarchy, and component summary.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_list_components
tools.description: List components attached to a GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_get_component_fields
tools.description: Read serialized fields from a component on a scene GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_get_component_fields_batch
tools.description: Read serialized fields from multiple scene components by component id.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_create
tools.description: Create a new GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_delete
tools.description: Delete one or many GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_duplicate
tools.description: Duplicate one or many GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_reparent
tools.description: Move objects under a new parent (or scene root).

tools.name: unity_gameobject_rename
tools.description: Rename a GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_active
tools.description: Set active state for GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_transform
tools.description: Set transform properties on a GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_tag
tools.description: Set a tag on one or many GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_layer
tools.description: Set a layer on one or many GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_static
tools.description: Set the static flag on one or many GameObjects.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_add_component
tools.description: Add a component to a scene GameObject.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_remove_component
tools.description: Remove one component from a scene GameObject by type or component id.

tools.name: unity_gameobject_set_component_fields
tools.description: Set serialized fields on a component attached to a scene GameObject.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_get
tools.description: Inspect a prefab asset summary.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_get
tools.description: Inspect a prefab instance summary.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_get_overrides
tools.description: Inspect detailed overrides for one prefab instance root.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_find_gameobjects
tools.description: Search GameObjects inside a prefab asset by hierarchy, type, or metadata filters.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_get_gameobject
tools.description: Get a prefab asset GameObject snapshot including hierarchy, local transform, and component summary.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_get_component_fields
tools.description: Read serialized fields from a component inside a prefab asset.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_create
tools.description: Save a scene object as a prefab.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_create
tools.description: Instantiate a prefab into a scene.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_apply_overrides
tools.description: Apply prefab overrides from instances to source prefabs.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_revert_overrides
tools.description: Revert prefab overrides on instances.

tools.name: unity_prefab_instance_unpack
tools.description: Unpack prefab instances.

tools.name: unity_prefab_asset_create_variant
tools.description: Create a prefab variant from base prefab (optionally using instance overrides).

tools.name: unity_asset_find
tools.description: Search assets by type/name/label/path.

tools.name: unity_asset_get
tools.description: Read one asset's metadata and optional graph info.

tools.name: unity_asset_get_references
tools.description: Traverse references for one asset.

tools.name: unity_asset_move
tools.description: Move assets into a destination folder.

tools.name: unity_asset_rename
tools.description: Rename an asset.

tools.name: unity_asset_delete_to_trash
tools.description: Delete assets to OS trash/recycle bin.

tools.name: unity_asset_reimport
tools.description: Reimport one or many assets.

tools.name: unity_asset_import
tools.description: Import one or many existing project-relative files or folders under Assets/.

tools.name: unity_asset_set_labels
tools.description: Set/add/remove labels for an asset.

tools.name: unity_asset_copy
tools.description: Copy assets into a destination folder.

tools.name: unity_asset_create_folder
tools.description: Create one folder path under Assets/.

tools.name: unity_asset_create_text
tools.description: Create or overwrite one UTF-8 text asset and import it immediately.

tools.name: unity_asset_create_material
tools.description: Create one material asset bound to a specific shader.

tools.name: unity_asset_create_scriptable_object
tools.description: Create one ScriptableObject asset.
